error_signature: prevent users from entering more than four digits for the year
title: Date input allows more than four digits for the year
symptom: Users can enter more than four digits for the year in the date input field, causing the input to malfunction.
applies_when: Using the input component with type 'date'
User attempts to enter a year
not_this_if: User enters a valid year format
root_cause: The date input component does not have a built-in validation to restrict the year input to four digits, leading to potential errors when users input invalid year formats.
fix_steps: Set a maximum date in the date input settings to limit the year input.
Ensure the maximum date is set to a value that corresponds to a four-digit year.
agent_instruction: Set a maximum date in the date input settings to prevent users from entering more than four digits for the year.
